fields.label: Chart type (aggregation mode - NOT the visual shape)
fields.rationale: chart_type is the AGGREGATION MODE, not the visual shape. Count / Sum / Average sum rows of a DocType over time (requires document_type + based_on + value_based_on for Sum / Average). Group By aggregates rows by a field (requires group_by_based_on + group_by_type). Custom pulls from a Dashboard Chart Source plugin. Report plots a pre-existing Report. IMPORTANT: chart_type is set_only_once - cannot be changed after the chart saves, so pick the right mode up front.

fields.label: Source DocType (for Count / Sum / Average / Group By)
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type is Count / Sum / Average / Group By. Cannot be a Single DocType (the controller rejects that). Empty when chart_type is Report or Custom.

fields.label: Parent DocType (when document_type is a child table)
fields.rationale: Required when document_type is a child table (istable=1). Names the parent DocType so the chart can filter by parent. Empty when document_type is not a child table.

fields.label: Date field for time series (based_on)
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type is Count / Sum / Average AND timeseries=1. Names the date / datetime field that drives the X axis (e.g. posting_date). Empty for non-time-series or Group By.

fields.label: Numeric field to aggregate (for Sum / Average)
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type is Sum or Average. Names the numeric field summed or averaged on the Y axis. Empty for Count / Group By / Report / Custom.

fields.label: Group By aggregation (when chart_type='Group By')
fields.rationale: Only used when chart_type='Group By'. Count is the safe default (one bar per group). Sum / Average require aggregate_function_based_on naming a numeric field.

fields.label: Field to group by (when chart_type='Group By')
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type='Group By'. Names the DocField to group rows by (e.g. customer, status). Empty otherwise.

fields.label: Numeric field for Group By Sum / Average
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type='Group By' AND group_by_type is Sum or Average. Names the numeric field aggregated per group. Empty for Count.

fields.label: Number of groups (Group By)
fields.rationale: Caps the number of groups shown; others roll into 'Others'. 5 is the Frappe default and fits most pie / bar charts without clutter.

fields.label: Timespan
fields.rationale: Default window. 'Select Date Range' requires explicit from_date + to_date fields.

fields.label: Time interval
fields.rationale: Bucket size for time-series aggregation. Monthly balances signal with query cost for Last Year timespans.

fields.label: Timeseries
fields.rationale: 1 = X axis is time (based_on field). 0 = aggregate without time grouping. Forced to 0 by the form for chart_type Group By / Report.

fields.label: Render type (visual shape)
fields.rationale: The VISUAL shape, separate from chart_type. Line / Bar fit time-series; Pie / Donut / Percentage fit distributions under ~6 categories; Heatmap fits per-day density (requires heatmap_year).

fields.label: Report name (when chart_type='Report')
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type='Report'. Names an existing Report. set_only_once - cannot be changed after save. Empty for other chart_types.

fields.label: Use Report's built-in chart
fields.rationale: When chart_type='Report' AND the Report already defines a chart, set to 1 to reuse that definition (skips x_field / y_axis requirements). 0 means x_field + y_axis must be set.

fields.label: X-axis column (when chart_type='Report' and !use_report_chart)
fields.rationale: Required when chart_type='Report' AND use_report_chart=0. Names a column in the Report's output.

fields.label: Filters (JSON string)
fields.rationale: JSON list of Frappe filter triples, e.g. '[["Sales Invoice","status","=","Paid"]]'. '[]' means 'all rows' - the controller also auto-excludes docstatus=2 (cancelled) regardless of this filter.

fields.label: Public (all users)
fields.rationale: 0 = only visible to the owner. 1 = visible to every user. Dashboards that are_standard=1 typically use is_public=1 charts.
